title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Blue Dart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Blue Dart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Blue Dart Digital Technologies family as a Category Manager in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
